from flask import Flask, render_template_string

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/welcome/<name>")
def welcome(name):
    html = "<h1>Welcome, {{ name }}!</h1><p>Your account is active.</p>"
    return render_template_string(html, name=name)

@app.route("/error")
def error_page():
    template = """
    <html><body>
    <h1>Error {{ code }}</h1>
    <p>{{ message }}</p>
    </body></html>
    """
    return render_template_string(template, code=500, message="Something went wrong")
